name: Sanathan Astro Services
author: Sanathan App
description: Cached Predictions, Kundali, Personal Guruji AI with RAG (Qdrant + AIP), FCM push notifications, and AI Tools bulk import with Gemini image generation for the Sanathan Astrology platform.
changelog:
1.4.5

  • Fix: Inject socialv-breadcrumb hide rule via wp_add_inline_style() to bypass Hostinger LiteSpeed CSS file cache — hero now shows without duplicate theme banner.

1.4.4

  • Fix: Hide theme's socialv-breadcrumb banner on AI Tools pages (single + archive) — our hero provides its own breadcrumb.

1.4.3

  • Fix: Single page — use get_post_field(raw) instead of get_the_content() to bypass Elementor filter that was replacing post_content with its own rendered HTML.

1.4.2

  • Fix: Single AI Tool page — guide content (How-to-Use HTML) now renders correctly; was double-escaped as HTML entities in stored post_content.

1.4.1

  • Fix: Enable CPT archive for ai-toolai_tool via register_post_type_args filter — /ai-tools/ archive URL now works correctly.

1.4.0

  • New: AI Tools Archive page — beautiful responsive grid with hero banner, live search, and category filter tabs.
  • New: AI Tools Single page — featured image hero, breadcrumb navigation, styled AIP form box, and formatted How-to-Use guide.
  • New: Sidebar on single page with related tools and category browser.
  • New: SAS_AI_Tools_Frontend class — template override, taxonomy registration, asset enqueuing.
  • New: public/css/ai-tools.css and public/js/ai-tools.js — fully self-contained frontend styles and search/filter JS.

1.3.4

  • Fix: Gemini Imagen model updated from imagen-3.0-generate-001 to imagen-4.0-fast-generate-001 — featured image generation now works correctly.

1.3.3

  • Fix: AI Tool CPT slug reverted to ai-toolai_tool — all import, update, and image generation steps now target the correct post type that the theme registers.

1.3.2

  • Fix: AI Forms post type corrected to wpaicg_form (AI Puffer plugin) — import now finds all 104 forms.

1.3.1

  • Fix: AI Tools import now correctly detects AIKit forms (changed post type from wpaicg_form to aipkit_form).
  • Fix: Corrected AI Tool CPT slug from ai-toolai_tool to ai_tool — import and all setup steps now work.

1.3.0

  • AI Tools Setup: new admin page with 4 one-click operations.
  • Setup Categories: creates 7 canonical ai_tool_category terms (Vedic Astrology, Bhakti & Devotion, Mantra & Prayer, Hindu Scriptures, Spiritual Life, Vaastu & Remedies, Festivals & Rituals).
  • Import AI Tool Posts: bulk-imports AIP forms as ai_tool CPT posts, auto-detects category + tags, skips non-Sanathan forms.
  • Update Existing Posts: assigns categories/tags + Gemini SEO guide to the 13 existing posts.
  • Generate Featured Images: calls Gemini Imagen 3 API to create spiritual illustrations, uploads to Media Library, sets as featured image.
  • Gemini SEO Content: each AI Tool post gets a Gemini Flash-generated "How to Use" guide (intro, numbered steps, results, tips) for SEO.
  • Settings: added Gemini API key field.

1.2.0

  • RAG Knowledge Base: Qdrant integration for semantic search over 43 Vedic astrology documents.
  • New Qdrant client (class-sas-qdrant.php) — direct REST API to Qdrant Cloud or self-hosted.
  • AIP embedding support — get_embedding() fetches 1536-dim vectors via AIP plugin.
  • Knowledge Base (class-sas-knowledge.php) — 43 documents: 12 zodiacs, 9 planets, 10 houses, 5 doshas, 6 remedies, 8 concepts.
  • Guruji chat() now searches Qdrant before calling AIP — grounded, accurate answers.
  • New admin page: Knowledge Base — index content and monitor Qdrant collections.
  • Settings: Qdrant URL + API key fields with live connection test.

1.1.0

  • Phase 2: Personal Guruji AI — per-user profiles, avatars, multilingual replies, AIP model selection.

1.0.0

  • Initial release: Predictions cache, Kundali storage, REST API, Admin UI.
